h1.visual_description: Large, light-weight sans-serif font, preceded by a section number, contained within a thin-lined rectangular box spanning the width of the page.

h2.visual_description: Bold, medium-sized sans-serif font, preceded by a hierarchical subsection number (e.g., 3.1).

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, bolded label followed by descriptive text.
Page footer / Page number located at the bottom outer margin.

visual_matchers.pattern: Colored square icon followed by text

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Internal cross-references to Figures and Tables (e.g., Figure 3.1.1, Table 3.1.1)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Isolated integers at the bottom left/right corners representing page numbers.
